title: Player From Another Server
description: This mod will make your minecraft scary by adding a mysterious mob to your world...
body:
When you install this mod, "player from another server" will begin to appear in your world, which will be hostile to you. I advise you to run away from him, because it is extremely difficult to kill him.

![player jumpscare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d429ae56b9278142b1c55f112128f8010686ae29.png)

If you hear strange whispers or sighs, just run! Although, if you want to, you can listen to his whispers and make out a secret message there

<details>
<summary>Reverse its speech and then you'll hear:</summary>
"Don't be afraid..."
</details>
